the position you are applying for may involve responsibilities that require a high level of trust and integrity. in connection with this, we ask that you indicate "yes" if you have been convicted of a criminal offense that is related to the job requirements, and "no" if you have not. please be aware that a criminal record will not automatically prevent you from being considered for the position, and joey will meet its obligations, if any, under applicable human rights legislation.
